must_detect.matched_text:
Examples of data we process (anchored to specific individuals): Mr. Gavin Lok (Plant Supervisor, EmpID EM P–3 4 1) — biometric access template (hashed fingerprint) and occupational health record (lumbar disc treatment dated 2025‑02) for site safety compliance.
Ms. Raina Chu (Analyst, clean team) — union membership (Harbour Office Staff Federation no. U–19 8) and declared Buddhist religion for leave arrangements; no sexual‑orientation data is required for her role.
For minors’ data, Mr. Gavin Lok’s dependent child ref c h l d:CX-7 0 had a genetic screening report mistakenly uploaded to the diligence room; it has been quarantined and is scheduled for purge within 72 hours.
We may process identity data, payroll account aliases, and contact numbers such as +852 6 3 9 8 7 2 0 1; copies of local identity cards are not collected in the clean room unless strictly necessary and proportionate.
Inside information controls: specific corporation information not generally known to persons who are accustomed to or would be likely to deal in the issuer’s securities and reasonably expected to be price‑sensitive (Part XIVA, SFO) is ring‑fenced; DSAR responses may omit or defer such MNPI in line with exemptions.
M&A codename: Project Sea Lantern; systems used include NebulaFlow CRM and Eideron Cloud; mention of the Kaiyu City Mariners (sports) is illustrative only and is not inside information, and a metaphorical tiger does not hunt here.
Nothing in this notice constitutes, or shall be deemed to constitute, a Material Adverse Change, and any reference to public‑source filings relies on information already available on issuer announcements and news.
Data retention: payroll and health surveillance records are kept for 7 years from cessation; biometric templates rotate every 90 days; union and religion preferences are retained only for HR purposes and can be withdrawn through the DSAR channel.
DSAR & correction: submit at https://portal.oriole-delta.com/dsar?ref=cl%2Fhk%2Fma-017&u=EM%20P%E2%80%93341 or pr ivacy@oriole-delta.com; upon verification, we aim to respond within 40 days in accordance with PDPO requirements.
